# AI Provenance Protocol (APP)

> An open standard for recording, embedding, and verifying the provenance of AI-generated content.

> Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/llms-full.txt
> Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further.

## Documentation

- [Introduction](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/docs): What is the AI Provenance Protocol?
- [Getting Started](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/docs/getting-started): Quick start guide for implementors
- [Embedding Modes](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/docs/embedding-modes): Inline, HTTP header, and linked metadata modes
- [Verification Protocol](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/docs/verification-protocol): How third-party verification works
- [MCP Integration](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/docs/mcp-integration): Using APP with the Model Context Protocol
- [Regulatory Mapping](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/docs/regulatory-mapping): EU AI Act compliance matrix
- [SDKs](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/docs/sdk): Official SDKs for TypeScript and Python

## Specification

- [Specification Overview](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/specification): APP v1.0 specification
- [Core Schema](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/specification/core-schema): Required and optional metadata fields
- [Embedding Modes](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/specification/embedding-modes): Inline, HTTP headers, linked metadata
- [Verification Protocol](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/specification/verification-protocol): Level 1 and Level 2 verification
- [Content Hashing](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/specification/content-hashing): SHA-256 canonicalization
- [Extensions](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/specification/extensions): Namespaced domain-specific metadata
- [Security Considerations](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/specification/security): Integrity, spoofing, privacy
- [JSON Schema Reference](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/specification/json-schema): Machine-validatable schema
- [Versioning](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/specification/versioning): Semver policy

## Community

- [Community Overview](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/community): How to get involved
- [Contributing](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/community/contributing): Contribution guidelines
- [Governance](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/community/governance): Governance model
- [Roadmap](https://aiprovenanceprotocol.io/community/roadmap): Development roadmap
